hooks.command: python3 -c 'import sys, os, runpy; p = os.path.normpath(r"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/validate-sql.py"); p = ("\\?\\" + p) if os.name == "nt" else p; runpy.run_path(p, run_name="__main__")'; exit 0

python3 -c 'import sys, os, runpy; p = os.path.normpath(r"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/check-sql-files.py"); p = ("\\?\\" + p) if os.name == "nt" else p; runpy.run_path(p, run_name="__main__")'; exit 0
